verdict.summary: The round-1 major finding is resolved. The self-test now reads the authoritative review-fix workflow, scopes extraction to the resolve/claim/run/release jobs, and asserts that all critical-path timeouts and both workflow-local claim TTLs agree with the dispatcher constants and derived TTLs. Missing or unparsable workflow values fail closed. The resulting 4200/6300-second leases match the workflow claim path and cover the modeled job-timeout path plus queue slack. No new correctness, security, or test-validity issue is evident in the diff.
